mapper.select: SELECT id,title,type,category,summary,content,file_url,file_name, emp_no,branch_name,submit_time,remark,status,create_by, create_time,update_by,update_time,is_deleted,related_customers FROM experience_share WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0

SELECT id,title,type,category,summary,content,file_url,file_name, emp_no,branch_name,submit_time,remark,status,create_by, create_time,update_by,update_time,is_deleted,related_customers FROM experience_share WHERE is_deleted=0 AND status=#{status} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experience_share WHERE status=0 AND is_deleted=0
